tasks.label: cleanup: free ports 3000+8000
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $ports = @(3000, 8000); foreach ($port in $ports) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen; foreach ($conn in $conns) { try { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force } catch {} } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 250; exit 0
